name: ValueMax Group Limited
summary: ValueMax Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the pawnbroking, moneylending, retailing of jewellery and watches, gold trading, and remittance activities. It offers pawn broking services through pledging jewellery in yellow or white gold, diamond jewellery, and branded timepieces, as well as gold, platinum, or silver bars and coins as pledges. The company also provides secured and unsecured loans for businessmen and corporates; and financing services for automotive industry. In addition, it sells new and pre-owned jewellery, such as gold and diamond jewellery, gold bars and coins, branded watches, and Herm√É¬®s bags in its outlets; purchases scrap gold from other pawnbrokers and jewellery traders; sells fine gold bars to jewellery factories, wholesalers, and retailers; and provides services of remitting money. The company operates 40 pawn and retail outlets and one other pawnshops in Singapore, as well as 14 outlets in Malaysia. Further, it is involved in the provision of management and IT, business management and consultancy, and car financing services, as well as in the property holding activities. ValueMax Group Limited was founded in 1988 and is based in Singapore. ValueMax Group Limited is a subsidiary of Yeah Holdings Pte. Ltd.
